sidebar.title:
Knowledge Generator
& Doc Maintenance
sidebar.tagline: An AI learning engine that converts operational work into reusable knowledge — drafts resolution guides, proposes documentation updates, and keeps templates & FAQs current.

principle.label: ⚡ Key Principle — HITL-first
principle.text: No documentation is published without human sign-off. Every update is validated before it enters the knowledge base.

card.title: Documentation & Knowledge Interface
card.note: Knowledge owners and IT teams interact via search, upload, and guided editing

components.name: Doc Assessment & Cleanup
components.note: Assess and clean up existing documentation for accuracy and completeness

components.name: Conversational Search
components.note: Engage users through natural-language search over the knowledge base

components.name: Summarization
components.note: Summarize existing documentation and surface key capabilities

components.name: Guideline Compliance
components.note: Check documentation against Corporate guidelines and flag deviations

components.name: Human Sign-off & Publish
components.note: Route validated docs for human review, then update the knowledge base after sign-off

cards.name: Documentation Library
cards.desc: Resolution guides · templates · FAQs · operational runbooks

cards.name: Corporate Guidelines
cards.desc: Documentation standards · naming conventions · compliance rules

cards.name: Session Memory
cards.desc: Conversation history · review decisions · open items

rag.label: RAG / Retrieval Pipeline
rag.body: Vector store · semantic search over documentation library, guidelines, and operational knowledge

cards.name: Document Repositories
cards.detail: Technical docs · business specs · operational runbooks

cards.name: ForBot
cards.detail: Internal knowledge base and process automation connector

cards.name: Integration Catalog
cards.detail: Enterprise integration patterns and connector registry
